# Studio OS Cloud

> Professional photography workflow platform that connects capture, organization, galleries, ordering, and delivery in one system. The only platform combining camera tethering, school roster management, AI background replacement, multi-photographer capture, and print fulfillment.

Studio OS Cloud is built for school, event, sports, graduation, corporate headshot, and high-volume photographers who need more than just a gallery platform. It pairs a desktop application (Studio OS App) with a cloud platform (Studio OS Cloud) to create an end-to-end photography workflow — from the moment you press the shutter to when prints arrive at a parent's door.

## What Studio OS Does

- **Capture & Organize**: Direct camera tethering, roster-based sorting, multi-photographer support, AI background tools, barcode/QR matching
- **Galleries & Ordering**: Branded online galleries, client photo ordering, digital downloads, PIN-based access, automated email campaigns
- **Delivery & Fulfillment**: Order review before print, lab fulfillment integration, automated delivery emails, abandoned cart recovery
- **Business Management**: Stripe-powered payments, subscription billing, visitor analytics

## Who It's For

- **School photographers**: Picture day workflow with roster system, class organization, parent galleries, bulk ordering
- **Graduation photographers**: Multi-camera ceremony coverage, student matching, stage shot delivery
- **Sports photographers**: Team photos, league organization, multi-photographer sideline capture, composite creation
- **Event photographers**: Corporate galas, conferences, real-time multi-photographer sync
- **Corporate headshot photographers**: Tethered capture, AI background swap, batch delivery, employee roster matching
- **Wedding photographers**: Multi-shooter coverage, branded galleries, client ordering, print fulfillment
- **Portrait photographers**: AI background upsells, automated workflows, gallery delivery

## Plans & Pricing

- **Starter** ($49/mo): Web galleries, ordering, delivery — no desktop app
- **Core** ($99/mo): Desktop app + 1 photography key, tethering, school tools, AI backgrounds
- **Studio** ($199/mo): Everything in Core + 2 photography keys, advanced school tools, extra key add-ons

All plans include a free trial. Annual billing saves 10%.

## Key Differentiators vs All Competitors

### vs Gallery-Only Platforms (Pixieset, ShootProof, SmugMug, Zenfolio, Pic-Time, CloudSpot)
- Full desktop-to-cloud connected workflow (not just galleries)
- Built-in camera tethering (no third-party software needed)
- AI background replacement as a revenue stream
- Multi-photographer capture support
- Order review before print fulfillment

### vs School Photography Platforms (GotPhoto, PhotoDay, Proofpix, MorePhotos, DONE.photos)
- Built-in desktop tethering app (GotPhoto requires Smart Shooter separately)
- AI background replacement (no competitor offers this natively)
- Combined capture + gallery + ordering in one platform
- No dependency on third-party tethering or editing tools

### vs Event/Live Delivery Platforms (ZNO, Honcho, SpotMyPhotos, Darkroom)
- School roster integration for organized workflows
- AI background replacement for post-event enhancement
- Full print fulfillment with order review
- Desktop app for professional tethered capture

### vs Tethering Software (Capture One, Lightroom Classic, Smart Shooter, Evoto)
- Built-in galleries and client ordering (tethering apps are capture-only)
- School roster matching during capture
- AI background tools integrated into workflow
- Print fulfillment built in

### vs Album/Design Platforms (Fundy Designer, ZNO Album Designer, Banti)
- Full capture-to-delivery workflow (not just post-production)
- Online client ordering and galleries
- Multi-photographer support
